purpose: Collecting and processing insurance applications for motor, home, and health products
data_categories: Name, DOB, address, email, phone, property details, vehicle details, coverage requirements
notes: Standard application intake across all product lines.

purpose: Ongoing policy management including renewals, endorsements, and cancellations
data_categories: Policy details, coverage amounts, premium history, endorsement records, renewal dates
notes: Automated renewal processing 30 days before expiry.

purpose: Adjudicating claims including documentation review, loss adjustment, and settlement
data_categories: Claim details, incident descriptions, supporting documents, witness statements, police reports, medical reports, repair estimates
notes: Third-party adjusters used for claims exceeding EUR 25,000.

purpose: Processing health questionnaire responses for health insurance underwriting
data_categories: Self-reported medical conditions, prescription medications, smoking status, BMI, family medical history, alcohol consumption, exercise frequency
retention_period: Active policy + 12 months; declined applications 24 months
notes: Health data collected via in-app questionnaire. No medical examinations required for standard applications. Data used as input to automated underwriting model.

purpose: Monitoring claims and applications for fraud indicators
data_categories: All application and claims data, IP addresses, device fingerprints, behavioral analytics, cross-referencing with claims databases
notes: Real-time fraud scoring on claims submission. Retrospective analysis on historical claims data.

processing_activity: External Risk Data — Motor Vehicle Records and Claims History
purpose: Obtaining driving records and prior claims history from LexisNexis for motor insurance underwriting
data_categories: Motor vehicle records (driving offences, licence status, penalty points), claims history (CLUE report — 5-year loss history), property records (for home insurance), identity verification scores
retention_period: Retained with application — same as PROC-001
notes: Data obtained at point of quote. Applicant is informed during quote flow: 'We may verify information with external databases.' No specific mention of LexisNexis or data types obtained. Data used as input to automated underwriting.

purpose: Obtaining credit scores and financial indicators from TransUnion for risk assessment
data_categories: Credit score, credit history summary (length of history, number of accounts), payment behavior indicators (late payments, defaults), bankruptcy and insolvency records
retention_period: Retained with application — same as PROC-001
notes: Soft credit check (does not appear on applicant's credit report). Performed at quote stage. Applicant informed: 'We may carry out a credit check as part of our assessment.' No specific mention of TransUnion or data types obtained.

purpose: Machine learning model processing application data to generate risk scores, premium calculations, and coverage eligibility decisions
data_categories: All PROC-001, PROC-004, PROC-006, PROC-007 data combined into feature vector for ML model. Outputs: risk_score (0-1000), premium_amount, coverage_decision (approve/conditional/decline), decline_reason_codes
data_source: Internal systems (aggregation of PROC-001 through PROC-007)
notes: Solely automated processing. No human review before initial decision. Human review available on appeal (applicant must request). Approximately 12% of applications declined by model. Model retrained quarterly on historical data. SHAP-based explainability available in underwriting dashboard.

purpose: Sharing policy and claims data with reinsurance counterparties
data_categories: Policy details, claims data, aggregate loss experience, individual large loss reports
notes: Data shared per reinsurance treaty obligations. Individual claim data shared for claims exceeding EUR 100,000.

purpose: Email marketing campaigns for renewal reminders, cross-sell, and product launches
data_categories: Name, email, policy type, renewal date
notes: Opt-in consent collected at application. Unsubscribe in every email.
